question.text: An increase in risk-free interest rates will cause:

answer.text: Call premium to increase and Put premium to decrease
Both call and put premiums to increase
Both call and put premiums to decrease
Call premium to decrease and Put premium to increase

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Higher interest rates increase the cost of carry, benefiting call holders (opportunity cost of buying now vs later). Calls have positive Rho; Puts have negative Rho. **The Trap:** Interest rate effect is OPPOSITE for calls and puts — unlike volatility and time which affect both the same way. **Cross-Exam Context:** Interest rate impact on options is tested in Series I and VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** In practice, interest rate changes have a smaller impact on short-term currency options compared to spot price and volatility changes.
